nasb.text: I will also strike down the inhabitants of this city, both man and beast; they will die of a great pestilence.

esv.text: And I will strike down the inhabitants of this city, both man and beast. They shall die of a great pestilence.

cnv.text: 我要擊打住在這城的人和牲畜，他們都要因極大的瘟疫而死。

ccb.text: 我要击打这城里的居民和牲畜，使他们死于瘟疫。
